title: Former Syrian Officials Found Guilty in Torture of Pro-Democracy Protesters
summary_full: The case against the two men, who have been living in Austria since 2015, was one of the first that the country has brought under the principle of universal jurisdiction.
summary_public: The case against the two men, who have been living in Austria since 2015, was one of the first that the country has brought under the principle of universal jurisdiction.
